modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request for creation of a PsychData account

full_description_text:  
User submitted a request for a PsychData account.  
They need access to the survey tool.  
The request was made through the self-service form.  
No additional details were provided.
